title: carex hormathodes
intro: Carex hormathodes, also known as Horned Sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe, particularly in the Alps, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for conditions like bronchitis and coughs. Carex hormathodes can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations like salves and poultices to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
